PATCH /organizers/admin/design-requests/1/ - Triage one design request: move its status (open → in_progress → applied/rejected)

GET /organizers/events/1/rating/ - Return an event's PUBLIC rating aggregate (average rounded to 1dp + count). Auth is
POST /organizers/events/1/comment/ - Attach a free-text comment to an event from the current user. Empty / whitespace-only
GET /organizers/event-comments/1/ - Return an event's comments for the organizer, NEWEST FIRST. Gated by

POST /organizers/report-organization/sample-slug/ - File an abuse report against an organization. Open to ANY logged-in user — the
GET /organizers/admin/reports/ - Oversight list of every organization report for AFC staff. Gated by
PATCH /organizers/admin/reports/1/ - Triage one report: update its status and/or resolution_notes, recording the
GET /api/v1/partner/events/ - GET /events/ — paginated list of the published events this partner may read,
GET /api/v1/partner/events/sample-slug/ - GET /events/<slug>/ — one event's public card, or 404 if out of scope.
GET /api/v1/partner/events/sample-slug/stages/ - GET /events/<slug>/stages/ — paginated stages of the event, each with its groups
GET /api/v1/partner/events/sample-slug/matches/ - GET /events/<slug>/matches/ — paginated matches of the event (room creds stripped
GET /api/v1/partner/events/sample-slug/standings/ - GET /events/<slug>/standings/ — the event's final ranked standings.
GET /api/v1/partner/events/sample-slug/teams/ - GET /events/<slug>/teams/ — paginated tournament teams of the event with their
GET /api/v1/partner/events/sample-slug/players/ - GET /events/<slug>/players/ — paginated list of the players who recorded stats in
GET /player/get-all-players/ - ADMIN players list. Returns EVERY user with lightweight aggregate stats
POST /player/get-public-player-stats/ - PUBLIC player profile + PRIVACY-GATED stats, keyed by USERNAME / IGN.
POST /player-market/invite-player-to-trial/ - Team invites a player who posted a PLAYER_AVAILABLE post.
GET /player-market/my-trial-invites/ - Player views all direct trial invites received from teams.
POST /player-market/respond-to-trial-invite/ - Player accepts or declines a DirectTrialInvite.
GET /player-market/admin/all-trials-and-applications/ - Admin view to see all trials and applications in the system.
GET /player-market/post-details/ - Public endpoint — no auth required.
GET /player-market/my-posts/ - Returns all recruitment posts created by the authenticated user.
PATCH /player-market/edit-post/ - Edit a recruitment post. Only the creator can edit it.
DELETE /player-market/delete-post/ - Delete a recruitment post. Only the creator can delete it.
POST /player-market/report-post/ - File an abuse report against a player-market post. Open to ANY logged-in user.
GET /player-market/admin/reports/ - Triage list of every market report for moderators. Gated by _is_market_moderator
PATCH /player-market/admin/reports/1/ - Triage one report: update its status and/or resolution_notes, recording the
POST /player-market/admin/ban/ - Ban a PLAYER or a TEAM from the player market for a duration (or permanently).
PATCH /rankings/seasons/1/ - Edit a season's name / dates / transfer-window dates / ``is_active``.
PATCH /rankings/seasons/1/transfer-window/ - Open / close / extend a season's transfer window.
GET /rankings/seasons/1/transfer-log/ - List a season's transfer-window history (newest first). Read-only → no reason, no audit.
PATCH /rankings/seasons/1/team-tier/1/ - Pin (or clear) a team's tier by hand for a season (§5 / §11).
POST /rankings/seasons/1/zero-team/1/ - Zero a team's quarterly score on a ban (§2.15).
POST /rankings/seasons/1/unzero-team/1/ - Lift a team's ban-zero (§2.15) — clears ``is_zeroed`` + the reason so the next
POST /rankings/seasons/1/zero-player/1/ - Zero a player's quarterly score on a ban (§2.15). Players have no tier override or
POST /rankings/seasons/1/deduct-points/1/ - Apply a manual partial penalty to a team (§16).
POST /rankings/seasons/1/clear-deduction/1/ - Remove a team's manual point penalty (§16) — resets ``points_deducted`` to 0 and
GET /rankings/admin/audit-log/ - Filtered, paginated view of the §16 RankingAuditLog (read-only).
GET /rankings/admin/teams/1/raw/ - Raw aggregation behind a team's CURRENT-quarter score (read-only).
GET /rankings/admin/players/1/raw/ - Raw aggregation behind a player's CURRENT-quarter score (read-only).
POST /rankings/ghost-teams/11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111/players/ - POST ghost-teams/<uuid>/players/ — append ONE ghost player to an existing ghost team.
POST /rankings/ghost-teams/11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111/approve-claim/ - POST ghost-teams/<uuid>/approve-claim/ — mark the ghost as claimed.
POST /rankings/ghost-teams/11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111/revoke-claim/ - POST ghost-teams/<uuid>/revoke-claim/ — undo a claim.
GET /rankings/scoring-config/defaults/ - Return just the constants.py defaults snapshot (the "factory reset" payload).
POST /rankings/event-tier-rules/reorder/ - Reassign priorities from an ordered list of rule ids. Body: { order: [rule_id, ...], reason }.
POST /rankings/event-tier-rules/classify/ - Dry-run the SAME first-match-wins logic against a hypothetical event.
PATCH /rankings/event-tier-config/ - Update the singleton fall-through default tier. Body: { default_tier, reason }.
GET /rankings/admin/tournament-prizes/ - List prize payouts, newest first. Optional ?season_id filter.
POST /rankings/prize/ - Record a new prize payout for a tournament team.
GET /rankings/admin/results/markers/ - List a season's tournaments with their counting-control state + active-exclusion count.
DELETE /rankings/result-exclusions/1/ - Remove a result exclusion — the freed entity's results count again.
GET /rankings/admin/seasons/1/social/ - List every team with its social snapshot for the season (newest-named last). Read-only.
PATCH /rankings/admin/seasons/1/social/1/ - Admin corrects a team's follower counts / handles for the season.
POST /rankings/admin/seasons/1/social/1/verify/ - Mark a team's social snapshot verified — its points now COUNT toward the score.
POST /rankings/admin/seasons/1/social/1/unverify/ - Revoke verification — the team's social points DROP to 0 on the next recalc.
POST /rankings/admin/seasons/1/social/1/connect/ - Self-connect — a team links its IG / TikTok handles (pending admin verification).
POST /rankings/seasons/1/run-evaluation/ - Run the quarterly tier EVALUATION for a season (§16 tier lock).
GET /rankings/admin/recalc-status/ - Recalc / evaluation status for a season (read-only → no reason, no audit).
POST /rankings/admin/recalc/ - Manually trigger a single entity's recalc (head_admin OR metrics_admin).
PATCH /rankings/seasons/1/publish/ - Set the rankings / tiers publish flags for a season.
GET /rankings/admin/teams/quarterly/ - Ungated draft of team quarterly scores (full data incl. unpublished tiers + the
GET /rankings/admin/players/quarterly/ - Ungated draft of player quarterly scores for admin preview.
POST /shop/add-product/ - Create a product + its variants in one request.
GET /shop/view-active-products/ - PUBLIC storefront product list -- only ACTIVE products, no auth required.
POST /shop/edit-product/ - Update a product's fields, its category, optional image, and (optionally)
GET /shop/view-product-details/ - Public product detail (no auth) used by both the user detail page and the
GET /shop/view-all-categories/ - List every category (active + inactive) with product counts.
GET /shop/view-active-categories/ - List only active categories, ordered for display.
POST /shop/create-category/ - Create a new product category.
POST /shop/add-product-media/ - Upload one or more media files (images + videos) for a product.
POST /shop/delete-product-media/ - Delete a single media item from a product's gallery.
POST /team/get-team-details/ - PUBLIC team detail + PRIVACY-GATED team statistics, keyed by team_name.
POST /team/respond-invite/1/ - Accept or decline an invite based on user's choice.
POST /events/advance-round-robin/ - Advance teams out of a finished BR Round-Robin stage into the next stage (Task 5).
POST /events/validate-team-roster-discord/ - Checks roster Discord readiness BEFORE registration:
